arts.ttl: Friedkins can turn Everton into ‘strong hypothesis’ for manager – He’s waiting for options to be offered
arts.sum: Everton could become a ‘strong hypothesis’ for Portuguese coach Sérgio Conceição, who is waiting to see what jobs may be available to him. That’s according to Mais Futebol, who report that Conceição is keen to hold off on taking any jobs to see what comes up in the coming weeks. arts.ttl: How to watch Everton vs Wolves
arts.sum: Everton vs Wolves kicks off at 7.30pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 7pm. The show begins about 30 minutes before kick-off at Goodison Park, bringing supporters team news and talking points before the 7.30pm start.
